items.claim: Cody Duran has poor durability and is prone to being finished.
items.quote: Cody Duran has been finished seven times. two by knockout and five by submission.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa possesses significant power for the flyweight division.
items.quote: Allesandre Costa, the dude has a ton of power for the flyweight division.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa has a questionable chin and is susceptible to being knocked out.
Zach Reese has poor striking defense and is frequently hurt in his fights.
items.quote: I don't like the striking defense of Zach Reese. He has that tall man's defense. I think he's very chinny and he's getting hurt in a lot of these fights.

items.claim: Zach Reese has superior cardio and grappling experience compared to Ryan Gander.
items.quote: He's more proven with the cardio, with the grappling. He's more proven when fights get extended.

items.claim: Caesar Almeida's chin is beginning to deteriorate due to age and accumulated damage.
items.quote: Caesar Almeida is getting up there in age. He's 38 years old. He's never been knocked out in kickboxing or MMA, but I think his chin is starting to deteriorate a little bit.
